01-boot-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
01-boot-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+; using an older parent version would cause dependency resolution conflicts and incompatibility with the target JDK.

01-boot-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
01-boot-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target environment if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

01-boot-demo/src/test/java/demo/Applicat.general_idea: Migrate test annotations and imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
01-boot-demo/src/test/java/demo/Applicat.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 runner classes and annotations are no longer supported or compatible with the new test context infrastructure.
